case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. SANTOS GALLARDO VENANCIO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SANTA CASTILLO, ASSISTANT MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY 1, 2020 AT 10 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-01-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC., REPRESENTED BY SANTA CASTILLO, ASSISTANT MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANTOS GALLARDO VENANCIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-21-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-22-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-27-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SANTA CASTILLO ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT SANTOS GALLARDO VENANCIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLARDO VENANCIO, SANTOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
